privileged_info_summary: The task uses three synthetic data files created at runtime: (1) /tmp/ground_truth.json containing randomly-generated incident date and officer name used for verification, (2) /home/ga/task_instructions.txt containing task instructions with the complaint case number, and (3) /home/ga/Documents/Incident_Report.txt containing a fictional police incident report with matching date and officer name. All date values are generated as dates between 0-180 days in the past (YYYY-MM-DD format). Officer names are randomly selected from a fixed list of 6 fictional names (Sgt. Al Powell, Officer John McClane, Det. Martin Riggs, Officer Sarah Connor, Dep. Rick Grimes, Det. Alonzo Harris). No real personal information or external data sources are used.
